messages.author: Jan Pasi
messages.text: Hi I've recently bought a Heltec V4 and flashed it with MeshCore. The problem now ist that it doesn't get received from the mesh. When I send a message it only says "sent". Sending to a second node right next to it works tho Does anyone know what the issue could be?
messages.content_html: Hi I've recently bought a Heltec V4 and flashed it with MeshCore. The problem now ist that it doesn't get received from the mesh. When I send a message it only says "sent". Sending to a second node right next to it works tho Does anyone know what the issue could be?

messages.author: Di
messages.text: Yea, the 1.4.1 build does not support the new heltec v4.3 boards yet. However, the nightly builds do. You can flash the latest nightly build by using weebl’s flasher here: https://mcimages.weebl.me/
messages.content_html: Yea, the 1.4.1 build does not support the new heltec v4.3 boards yet. However, the nightly builds do. You can flash the latest nightly build by using weebl’s flasher here: https://mcimages.weebl.me/

messages.author: Fordie
messages.text: Hi Di .i too am following as have 20 v4.3 boards for a project and am too suffering tx issues. Where can i monitor when a main release comes out with the fix ? Thanks in advance karl
messages.content_html: Hi Di .i too am following as have 20 v4.3 boards for a project and am too suffering tx issues. Where can i monitor when a main release comes out with the fix ? Thanks in advance karl

messages.author: Jan Pasi
messages.text: Nice! I've tried and it worked like a charm Very thanks
messages.content_html: Nice! I've tried and it worked like a charm Very thanks
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
Di
Yea, the 1.4.1 build does not support the new heltec v4.3 boards yet. However, the nightly builds do. You can flash the latest nightly build by using weebl’s flasher here: https://mcimages.weebl.me/

messages.author: Di
messages.text: The nightly build is 1.14.1 with minor changes to like 12 lines of code. I’ve been running the nightly and it’s been great
messages.content_html: The nightly build is 1.14.1 with minor changes to like 12 lines of code. I’ve been running the nightly and it’s been great
